description_long: This is a rectangular, upright beverage carton with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, featuring a large, realistic image of a pomegranate and splashes of water on the front. The branding 'Paradise' is prominently displayed in bold blue letters, with additional text and a heart-shaped green label indicating a health-related message. The carton has a white plastic screw cap located at the top corner, which is slightly raised and easy to grip. The sides of the carton display nutritional information, barcodes, and other product details in smaller text. The surface appears to be made of laminated paperboard with a glossy finish, and the overall shape is tall and boxy, typical of single-serve or family-sized drink cartons.
description: A tall, rectangular beverage carton with a white plastic screw cap, blue and white branding, and a large pomegranate image on the front. The surface is glossy and covered with detailed product information and graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing nutritional information, a barcode, and part of the cap at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Paradise' branding, pomegranate imagery, and water splash graphics.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional product details, barcode, and a partial view of the cap.
description_view_3: Back view featuring extensive text, likely ingredients and nutritional facts, with minimal graphics.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Paradise' in large blue letters, a red pomegranate image, water splash graphics, and a green heart-shaped label. Additional text and branding are present on the sides and back in smaller fonts, with a barcode and nutritional information.
attribute_cap_type: White plastic screw cap, cylindrical with a slightly raised grip, located at the top corner.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, slightly raised neck integrated into the top corner of the carton, with threading for the screw cap and no additional flares or ridges.
